jsonld.name: Backfire Granularity Asymmetry
jsonld.description: Epistemic imbalance during response generation where harmful outcomes (defensive entrenchment, calcified errors) can be modeled with high resolution and confidence while potentially productive outcomes remain structurally uncertain, creating risk assessment where vivid-failure competes with uncertain-possibility.
